title: Smoky Gooey Tomato Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly smoky tomato dish with a midnight craving profile suitable for Canadian cuisine and dietary preferences.
instructions: Preheat a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
Halve the tomatoes and blanch them for about 30 seconds, then rinse with cold water to stop the cooking process.
Cut each tomato into wedges and place them in the skillet along with the garlic cloves.
Drizzle olive oil on top of the tomatoes and sprinkle chili flakes and paprika over the mixture.
Sauté until the tomatoes are cooked through but still retain their bright red color, adding lemon juice at the last moment to enhance its zingy flavor.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
